headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says Iran Deal Announcement 'Shortly' With Hormuz 'Opened'; Tesla, AI Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.summary: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
summary: The stock market rebounded for solid weekly gains on Iran deal hopes, with talks continuing over the weekend. Tesla is near a buy point along with ASML and several other AI stocks.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
raw.summary: The stock market rebounded for solid weekly gains on Iran deal hopes, with talks continuing over the weekend. Tesla is near a buy point along with ASML and several other AI stocks.

headline: Amazon, GE Vernova Lead 5 Stocks Near Buy Points In Strong Market
summary: AMZN is joined by a pair of AI stocks and S&P 500 members, Cadence Design Systems, whose software tools are used to design advanced semiconductors, and GE Vernova, whose gas turbines power data centers.  AMZN was added to the SwingTrader portfolio on Thursday, while GEV is part of the IBD Leaderboard portfolio of elite stocks.  Both Amazon and CDNS have an excellent IBD Composite Rating of 98 out of a possible 99, according to IBD Stock Checkup.

headline: ront Street Bought 384K More Shares of Enovis in Q1. Is ENOV a Buy Now?
summary: Enovis develops orthopedic and rehabilitation devices for healthcare providers, serving a broad spectrum of musculoskeletal patient needs.
